name: Albert & Herberts julkalender
overview: Albert is obsessed with Christmas. The moment December begins, he pulls out all the holiday decorations from the attic. But his son Herbert doesn’t share the same festive spirit. Tired of Albert’s over-the-top enthusiasm, Herbert decides that this year, they’ll each celebrate Christmas their own way—separately.

trailers.title: Det bästa Från Albert och Herberts Julkalender Sista Delen ( God Jul , Tack alla som har kollat )
